issues.description: Trigger should be 'StartOfTurn' not 'Activated'. Text says 'at the start of your turn', which is a fixed timing trigger, not a player-activated ability.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect involves: (1) looking at 5 cards from top of deck, (2) revealing up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} card to hand, (3) placing rest at top/bottom in any order. Current DSL only captures a basic search with no card count limit, type filter, or deck arrangement step.
Condition uses 'HasAttachedDon' but text says 'DON!! cards on your field' which refers to resting DON cards (HasRestingDon), not attached DON.
